flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Bethel College-North Newton fell 35% between 2021 and 2024 (33.3% → 21.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bethel College-North Newton rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.2k → $35.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bethel College-North Newton rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.2k → $35.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bethel College-North Newton fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (46.5% → 41.1%).
